title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in AI chips, models, and applications, China holds an infrastructure advantage in data center power generation and transmission. The analysis traces this gap to structural differences: the US's fragmented federal-state-local governance versus China's centralized mandate system through NDRC and NEA, with implications for grid capacity, transmission infrastructure, and hyperscaler siting decisions.
